heading: Replacement of lost income: involuntarily mobilized reserve component members and members of the Space Force subject to extended and frequent active duty service
label: 910 Replacement of lost income: involuntarily mobilized reserve component members and members of the Space Force subject to extended and frequent active duty service

children.heading: .—Payment Required
children.label: a .—Payment Required
children.text: The Secretary concerned shall pay to an eligible member of a reserve component of the armed forces or of the Space Force an amount equal to the monthly active-duty income differential of the member, as determined by the Secretary, when the total monthly military compensation of the member is less than the average monthly civilian income of the member. The payments shall be made on a monthly basis.

children.label: A
children.text: completes 547 continuous days of service on active duty under an involuntary mobilization order;

children.label: B
children.text: completes 730 cumulative days on active duty under an involuntary mobilization order during the previous 1,826 days; or

children.label: C
children.text: is involuntarily mobilized for service on active duty for a period of 180 days or more within 180 days after the date of the member’s separation from a previous period of active duty for a period of 180 days or more.

children.label: A
children.text: satisfies the required number of days on active duty specified in subparagraph (A) or (B) of paragraph (1) or was involuntarily mobilized as provided in subparagraph (C) of such paragraph; and

children.label: B
children.text: is retained on active duty under subparagraph (A) or (B) of because of an injury or illness incurred or aggravated while the member was assigned to duty in an area for which special pay under section 310, or paragraph (1) or (3) of section 351(a), of this title is available.section 12301(h)(1) of title 10

children.label: A
children.text: a differential payment under ; orsection 5538 of title 5

children.label: B
children.text: a comparable benefit under an administratively established program for civilian employees absent from a position of employment with the Federal Government in order to perform active duty in the uniformed services.
A payment under this section shall be made to a member for a month only if the amount of the monthly active-duty income differential for the month is greater than $50.
Notwithstanding the amount determined under subsection (d) for a member for a month, the monthly payment to a member under this section may not exceed $3,000.
the average monthly civilian income of the member; and
the member’s total monthly military compensation.

The term “average monthly civilian income”, with respect to a member of a reserve component or the Space Force, means the amount, determined by the Secretary concerned, of the earned income of the member for either the 12 months preceding the member’s mobilization or the 12 months covered by the member’s most recent Federal income tax filing, divided by 12.

children.label: A
children.text: the amount of the regular military compensation (RMC) of the member; and

children.label: B
children.text: any amount of special pay or incentive pay and any allowance (other than an allowance included in regular military compensation) that is paid to the member on a monthly basis.

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: f .—Regulations
children.text: This section shall be administered under regulations to be prescribed by the Secretary of Defense.

children.heading: .—Termination
children.label: g .—Termination
children.text: No payment shall be made to a member under this section for months beginning after , unless the entitlement of the member to payments under this section commenced on or before that date.December 31, 2026
